1.title: Foundation Years
1.guidance: This period establishes your core identity and fundamental life patterns. Focus on building self-confidence and discovering your unique gifts.

2.title: Development Phase
2.guidance: A time of growth and learning through relationships. Develop cooperation skills while maintaining your individuality.

3.title: Expression Period
3.guidance: Your creative and expressive abilities reach their peak. Share your talents with the world and embrace opportunities for self-expression.

4.title: Mastery Phase
4.guidance: A period of consolidation and building lasting structures. Apply wisdom gained from previous milestones to create stability.

5.title: Wisdom Years
5.guidance: The culmination of life's lessons. Share your accumulated wisdom with others and embrace the freedom that comes with understanding.

1.description: A time of independence, leadership, and new beginnings. You are called to develop self-reliance and pioneer new paths.

2.description: This pinnacle emphasizes cooperation, diplomacy, and partnerships. Learning patience and sensitivity to others is key.

3.description: Creative expression, communication, and joy are highlighted. Embrace your artistic talents and social opportunities.

4.description: Building foundations, hard work, and practical achievement define this period. Focus on creating lasting structures.

5.description: Change, freedom, and adventure characterize this pinnacle. Embrace flexibility and diverse experiences.

6.description: Family, responsibility, and nurturing others take center stage. Focus on home, community, and service.

7.description: Spiritual development, introspection, and wisdom-seeking define this period. Time for study and inner growth.

8.description: Material achievement, power, and recognition are emphasized. Focus on career success and financial mastery.

9.description: Humanitarian service, completion, and universal love characterize this pinnacle. Time for giving back.

11.description: Spiritual inspiration and intuitive mastery are heightened. You may become a source of illumination for others.

22.description: Master builder energy for creating lasting legacies. Large-scale projects and visionary leadership are favored.

33.description: Master teacher energy focused on uplifting humanity. Your compassion and wisdom can heal and inspire many.

0.description: The challenge of all or nothing. You may face lessons related to any number, requiring versatility and adaptability.

1.description: Learning to stand on your own while avoiding excessive ego or dependency. Balance independence with cooperation.

2.description: Overcoming hypersensitivity and developing self-confidence. Learning to assert yourself while maintaining harmony.

3.description: Avoiding scattered energy and superficiality. Focus your creative talents and communicate authentically.

4.description: Overcoming rigidity and learning to work within limitations. Find freedom through discipline and organization.

5.description: Managing restlessness and avoiding excess. Learn to use freedom responsibly and embrace constructive change.

6.description: Avoiding perfectionism and controlling tendencies. Learn to serve without sacrificing yourself.

7.description: Overcoming isolation and cynicism. Balance intellectual pursuits with emotional connection.

8.description: Learning to handle power and money wisely. Avoid materialism while building legitimate success.

9.description: Releasing attachments and embracing universal love. Learn to give without expecting return.
